title: Hello
description: Hello message sent by the mobile app to the station via BLE characteristic FFF3 (Write). Initiates the authentication handshake.

appNonce.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte cryptographically random nonce (exactly 44 Base64 characters; N16 — was minLength:1).

appVersion.description: Semantic version of the mobile application

appEphemeralPubKey.description: The app's per-handshake ephemeral P-256 public key (compressed SEC1, Base64). Combined with the station's keys to derive the session key (06-security.md §6.5). Freshly generated per handshake and discarded after the session.
